breakdown: This PR fixes normalization of rewards_box in streaming passthrough to handle LLM-generated payloads with non-standard keys ('xp'/'xp_gained', 'gold'/'gold_pieces'). The core change adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui that checks both normalized and raw keys, then removes the raw keys after normalization. A new E2E test verifies this path using real LLM. Overall code quality is solid with good naming and architecture; minor deduction for lack of explicit error handling beyond silent coercion to defaults.
key_changes: Add fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: checks xp_gained first, falls back to xp; checks gold first, falls back to gold_pieces
Remove raw keys after normalization with normalized.pop() calls
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair before returning passthrough_rewards
New E2E test verifies normalization with messy LLM-generated rewards_box using 'xp' and 'gold_pieces' keys
Added WHY comment explaining LLM-generated payloads use non-standard boolean representations
